title: implosive-genesis — P-IMPLOSIVE: Implosive Genesis — recursive emergence of space, time and consciousness (V_RIG, OIPK, Frameprinciple, Type-6, fractal rendering engine)
description:
Implosive Genesis (V_RIG) is a theoretical-formal framework that models the emergence of space, time, and consciousness as a recursive, self-organising process, unifying principles from information theory, quantum mechanics, and consciousness research.

Part of the GenesisAeon ecosystem (P-IMPLOSIVE, domain: cosmology / recursive spacetime emergence).

See github.com/GenesisAeon/implosive-genesis for source, documentation, and reproducibility notebooks.
